name: shoot-and-scale-content-system
description: Shoot & Scale's content engine. Six skills: snapshot (client identity), bullseye (niche + content-mix), analyze (living Content Analysis from the client's own videos), create-format (bank a reusable format), produce (confirm the shoot, pitch the format split, write hook-graded scripts, build the branded doc), and revise (turn the client's green/yellow/red markup + comments into the next version of the same living doc, and learn from it). Formats are bank-only; runs on Sandcastles.
